channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « Un véritable fantôme » : ce virus s’attaque à 850 extensions de navigateur « sans laisser de traces »
item.description: « Un véritable fantôme » s'attaque actuellement à votre navigateur. Capable de siphonner toutes vos données, le malware Torg Grabber vise 850 extensions, dont des gestionnaires de mots de passe, des outils d’authentification et des portefeuilles crypto.

item.title: Google Issues New Warning About the Quantum Computing Security Apocalypse
item.description: The theoretical eventuality known as Q-Day may arrive much sooner than previously thought.

item.title: The Government’s Shittiest Website
item.description: For more than 30 years, the US Postal Service has sent people who need to change their addresses to MyMove. Experts say the site uses dark patterns to trap visitors in an online purgatory of “deals.”

item.title: Jo Nesbø's Detective Hole ending is too disturbing for words — but you couldn't have paid me to reveal the unhinged real-life inspiration behind the Netflix scene
item.description: Episode 10 of Detective Hole on Netflix reveals one fate that's too grim for words — but Jo Nesbø's real-life story behind it is even more ridiculous than the onscreen scene.

item.title: Need a new Apple Pencil? Here are 7 cheap alternatives to boost your iPad creativity, tried and tested by experts
item.description: Unlock your iPad's creative potential with our pick of the best Apple Pencil alternatives, many of which are now on sale.

item.title: Un fonctionnement entre -40°C à +60°C et une recharge en 11 minutes : cette batterie sodium pourrait ringardiser celles au lithium
item.description: Le constructeur chinois Beijing Automotive Group, plus connu sous le diminutif de BAIC, lève le voile sur les caractéristiques de sa batterie sodium "Aurora", présentée comme une alternative crédible au lithium, notamment en termes de prix.

item.title: Avec sa voiture électrique, Xiaomi a réalisé en 2 ans ce qui a demandé 10 ans à Tesla
item.description: La division automobile de Xiaomi, officiellement lancée fin 2023, vient de gagner de l’argent pour la première fois. Une très belle performance pour le constructeur de voitures électriques, qui rejoint un club très fermé.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide : le design du smartphone anti-Apple de Samsung se dévoile en rendus 3D
item.description: Le constructeur sud-coréen prépare une offensive majeure pour conserver sa place sur le marché des smartphones pliables. Afin de contrer frontalement le futur iPhone pliant d'Apple, Samsung s'apprête à lancer un tout nouveau modèle inédit au format élargi.

item.title: Uber aims to launch Europe’s first robotaxi service with Pony AI and Verne
item.description: Uber is joining forces with two companies, China's Pony AI and Croatia's Verne, to launch what it claims will be Europe's first commercially available robotaxi service. The vehicles are already being tested in Zagreb, Croatia, where Verne is headquartered, and will soon be available to customers on Uber's ridehail network. The announcement is the latest […]...

item.title: A little-known Croatian startup is coming for the robotaxi market with help from Uber
item.description: Verne, the robotaxi company launched under Rimac Group, is starting with a service in Zagreb, Croatia.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on Apple, Samsung, DJI, and Kindle deals
item.description: Get live updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: La surprise d’Apple : un capteur de 200 Mpx pour ses futurs iPhone ?
item.description: Apple serait en train de tester un capteur de 200 Mpx pour l'installer sur de futurs iPhone et ainsi tenir tête aux meilleurs smartphones en photo du côté d'Android.

item.title: Addiction, santé mentale des jeunes : Meta enchaîne les revers judiciaires
item.description: Mauvaise semaine pour Meta, mais un signal fort pour les victimes des réseaux sociaux. Le groupe de Mark Zuckerberg a été condamné à deux reprises par la justice américaine pour ses manquements dans la protection des mineurs face aux contenus et comportements dangereux.

item.title: 5 small shifts to turn creativity into a daily wellness practice
item.description: Creativity doesn’t have to be impressive to be effective. Below, coauthors Blythe Harris and Mallory May share five key insights from their new book, Daily Creative: The 5-Minute Habit to Rewire Your Brain.

item.title: Spring cleaning deals in Amazons Spring Sale: Save on kitchen, bathroom, and laundry supplies
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has cleaning deals to deep clean every room: Save on disinfectant sprays, shower scrubbers, vacuums, and more.

item.title: 35+ Amazon device deals in the Big Spring Sale: Echo, Fire TV, Kindle, and Blink
item.description: Shop the best live Amazon device deals during the Big Spring Sale — big discounts on Echo devices, Fire TVs, Kindles, and more.

item.title: The best power station deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale: Record lows on Jackery, Anker, and Bluetti
item.description: Portable power stations from Bluetti, Anker Solix, Jackery, and more are over 50% off during the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best drone deals to shop in Amazons Big Spring Sale — DJI drones are hitting best-ever prices
item.description: Shop the best drone deals from top brands during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save on DJI, Skyrover, and more.

item.title: The best cordless tool deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale — score record-low prices on DeWalt
item.description: The cordless tool deals you can buy in the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best Amazon Echo deals to shop in the 2026 Amazon Big Spring Sale — smart speakers and displays on sale
item.description: Shop the best deals on Amazon Echo smart speakers and displays during the 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Perfect Order and Ascended Heroes at record-low prices
item.description: Shop Pokémon deals in Amazon's Big Spring Sale, from TCG boxes and tins to discounted Nintendo Switch games.

item.title: The best Lego deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on Star Wars and Super Mario
item.description: Shop the best Lego deals during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best gaming deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale: Shop PS5, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch
item.description: Shop gaming deals live Amazon's Big Spring Sale, including gaming monitors and video games for PS5, Xbox, Nintendo Switch.

item.title: The best TV deals in the Amazon Spring Sale — score budget QLED TVs at record-low prices
item.description: Shop the best TV deals live during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Save on affordable QLED TVs from Hisense and TCL.

item.title: The best unlocked phone deals in the Amazon Spring Sale — iPhones starting at $287
item.description: Shop the best unlocked phone deals from Apple, Google, and Samsung during the Amazon Big Spring Sale. Find offers for free iPhone 17 smartphones.

item.title: The best beauty deals in Amazons Spring Sale — nows a great time to stock up on skincare and K-beauty favorites
item.description: The Shark FlexStyle, Dyson Airwrap, K-beauty favorites, Ouai hair products and more are discounted during Amazon's spring sale.

item.title: The best DJI deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale: Drones, mics, and power stations at record lows
item.description: These are the best DJI deals to shop during the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best deals under $25 in Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on Lego, Fire Sticks, and more
item.description: Have a look through our selection of the best deals under $25 available to shop now at Amazon ahead of its 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: 30+ deals under $50 from Amazons Big Spring Sale — Amazon devices, earbuds, video games
item.description: Amzon's Big Spring Sale has deals under $50 that include Amazon devices, Nintendo Switch games, Soundcore earbuds, Dreo fans, and more.

item.title: The best headphones deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale — Sony leads the pack
item.description: We've spotted over 20 worthwhile headphones and earbuds deals live already ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best Kindle deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale — Kindle Colorsoft, Paperwhite, and Scribe on sale
item.description: During Amazon's Big Spring Sale, the Kindle Colorsoft is back down to its lowest price ever. Get it now for just $169.99, saving you $80 off. Plus, save $150 on the Kindle Scribe.

item.title: The best tablet deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Score deals on the new iPad Air
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is here, and tablets are pretty good. Save on Apple iPads, Samsung Galaxy Tabs, and Amazon Fire Kids tablets.

item.title: The best laptop deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale: MacBooks are down to record-low prices
item.description: The best laptop deals live during Amazon's Big Spring Sale include discounts on M4 MacBook Airs and an Asus gaming convertible.

item.title: 20+ fitness tracker deals to shop in the Amazon Big Spring Sale — Garmin, Apple, and Google on sale
item.description: Fitness tracker deals are rolling in for the Amazon Big Spring Sale. Here's the best deals on Apple, Garmin, and more.

item.title: The best kitchen deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — 30+ deals on Breville, Ninja, Nespresso, and more
item.description: Blenders, espresso machines, air fryers, and more make up some of the best kitchen deals live during Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Stick vacuums on sale in Amazons Spring Sale: Shark is dunking on Dyson so far
item.description: Ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale, get the most powerful Shark vacuum for under $400 or get a self-emptying stick vacuum under $250.

item.title: Shark devices on sale in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Stick vacuums, stain removers, and hair tools
item.description: Some of our favorite Shark products are on sale at Amazon ahead of the Big Spring Sale: Get 25% off the Shark StainForce or Shark FlexStyle.

item.title: The best self-emptying robot vacuum deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Top picks from Dreame and Eufy on sale
item.description: Yes, it's worth it to get a self-emptying robot vacuum. Top picks from Dreame and Eufy are majorly discounted ahead of Amazon's spring sale.

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale: Our Dreame, Roborock, and Eufy favorites on sale
item.description: Top robot vacuums are on sale in Amazon's Big Spring Sale, like the Eufy C28 and Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete.

item.title: 40+ home deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on cooling sheets, air purifiers, and robot vacuums
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has some great home deals. We spotted savings on air purifiers, carpet cleaners, cooling bedding, and more.

item.title: 25+ Amazon spring sale deals on outdoor gear: Owala water bottles, Anker power stations, Solo Stoves, more
item.description: The Amazon Big Spring Sale has outdoor deals on Ninja coolers, Solo Stoves, Jackery power stations, Owala water bottles, and more.

item.title: Best Buy’s Tech Fest is over, but these deals are still worth your money
item.description: Best Buy's Tech Fest ended on Sunday, but you can still score serious discounts on Apple products, OLED TVs, and laptops.

item.title: Walmart is running its own Spring Sale — save on Apple, Shark, Ninja, and more top brands
item.description: Walmart has launched its spring sale to compete against Amazon's Big Spring Sale. The savings aren't as good as Amazon's, but we've plucked the best deals of out the weeds.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found 37 Big Spring Sale tech deals at Amazon Id actually buy
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: The best iPad deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Save up to $200 on Apple tablets
item.description: Shop the best iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. One M3 iPad Air has never been cheaper.

item.title: The best Apple AirTags deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — record-low prices live now
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is live. Score discounts on Apple AirTags to keep track of your luggage, keys, and wallet.

item.title: The best AirPods deals to shop in Amazons Big Spring Sale — AirPods 4 and AirPods Pro 3 on sale
item.description: The best AirPods deals to shop in Amazon's Big Spring Sale 2026. Save on AirPods 4 and AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: The best Apple Watch deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — score record-low deals on Series 9 and Series 11
item.description: Check out the best Apple Watch deals to shop during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Score discounts on Series 11 and SE 3 models.

item.title: The best MacBook deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — best-ever prices, including the MacBook Neo
item.description: We found the best MacBook deals at Amazon during the Big Spring Sale. Grab the MacBook Neo for $689 and M4 MacBook Airs for $899.

item.title: Streaming for less: Score Spring Sale deals on Paramount+, Spotify, Starz, and more.
item.description: The best Big Spring Sale streaming deals include free offers on Spotify and Amazon Music Unlimited, plus $22 off Paramount+.

item.title: Amazon is clearing out last-gen tech for the Big Spring Sale: Apples M4 MacBook Air hits best-ever price
item.description: We found the best deals on last-gen tech during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, with discounts on M4 MacBook Airs and Sony WF-1000XM5 earbuds.

item.title: We found the best Apple deals from Amazons Spring Sale — save on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: See all the best Apple deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including $50 off AirPods Pro 3 and $250 off M4 MacBook Air laptops.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is actually good: We found 100+ deals on Apple, DJI, Sony, and Shark
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Shop the best deals on Apple, headphones, TVs, and more.

item.title: Le navigateur web Samsung arrive officiellement sur Windows pour concurrencer Google Chrome
item.description: Après être resté un long moment en version bêta, le navigateur web de Samsung est enfin disponible en mouture stable pour les ordinateurs Windows. Un nouveau concurrent à Chrome qui se veut intégré à l’écosystème Samsung.

item.title: DreamWorks Forgotten Island trailer teases spectacular Filipino-inspired 90s adventure
item.description: Dreamworks has released the trailer for 'Forgotten Island,' and it looks like a spectacular, magical tale of friendship.

item.title: 20 secondes pour régler sa longueur : on a roulé avec cet étonnant vélo cargo électrique
item.description: Conçu et fabriqué en Allemagne, ce biporteur Qemeo n’est pas seulement bien équipé et haut de gamme : il est aussi et surtout réglable en longueur pour être aussi pratique que compact.

item.title: Samsung One UI 9 : regardez ces petits changements sur l’interface (galerie, widgets, Now Bar)
item.description: Des captures d'écran de Samsung One UI 9 (Android 17) montrent les petites évolutions de design à attendre sur la galerie photo, les widgets ou encore la Now Bar.

item.title: On a vu la première voiture électrique à batterie semi-solide : surprise, c’est la moins chère des MG
item.description: MG est le premier constructeur à commercialiser en Europe une voiture électrique à batterie semi-solide. En attendant la batterie solide, la MG4 Urban sera l'une des attractions de l'année. Pour la voir rouler, rendez-vous fin 2026.

item.title: Ce kit de démarrage Philips Hue ultra complet est bradé à moins de 150 €
item.description: Si vous souhaitez équiper votre cocon avec un éclairage intelligent, alors le kit de démarrage Philips Hue comprenant deux ampoules, deux barres lumineuses, une télécommande et un pont de connexion devrait tout à fait vous convenir. Un pack que Darty et la Fnac proposent d'ailleurs à 149,99 euros au lieu de 289,99 euros.
